boonCookieDescription: Earn $1 at end of round. Increases by $2 when a Boss is defeated
boonAllinDescription: Adds X4 Mult on final move of round
boonOffgridDescription: 各手の終わりにマス数に応じて <point>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Points</point> を追加
boonClickbaitDescription: このランでショップをリロールするたびに <multi>+2 Multi</multi>（現在 <multi>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Multi</multi>）
